action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 20 failed because bitsandbytes was missing. Previous full-precision LoRA OOM'd repeatedly; QLoRA drastically reduces memory. Analysis: QLoRA with 4-bit quantization should allow training on full dataset, enabling better spatial accuracy. The model trained earlier (500 samples) learned format but had near-zero IoU due to insufficient data. Decision: Install bitsandbytes, write QLoRA training script with full training set, val IoU monitoring, and automatic merge into self-contained checkpoint. Train for 2 epochs (capped if needed) and then submit eval to get improved grounding score.
